title: Energy markets on edge amid supply risks
section_path: Energy markets on edge amid supply risks
section_path_text: Energy markets on edge amid supply risks
summary:
Main
Precious metals recorded gains amid strong investor interest. Energy markets remain on edge, as supply risks rose. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2026-01-28 101338.png | assets/2026-01-28_energy-markets-on-edge-amid-supply-risks_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_33f4e92a0cdf.png

Market Commentary
Gold pushed higher, consolidating gains above USD5,000/oz, as investors look ahead to the upcoming Fed rate decision.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Precious metals recorded gains amid strong investor interest. Energy markets remain on edge, as supply risks rose.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Gold pushed higher, consolidating gains above USD5,000/oz, as investors look ahead to the upcoming Fed rate decision. A pause after three consecutive cuts remains the consensus view, however data overnight provide some reasons why we don't expect an extended pause.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: China's steel industry continues to suffer from overcapacity amid weak demand. Utilisation at steel mills has been failing in recent years.
